import {fileURLToPath as __rspack_fileURLToPath} from "node:url";
var __rspack_import_meta_filename__ = __rspack_fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
export const __rspack_esm_id = "foo";
export const __rspack_esm_ids = ["foo"];
export const __webpack_modules__ = {
353(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) {
/* import */ var _style_css__rspack_import_0 = __webpack_require__(711);
/* import */ var _dependency_js__rspack_import_1 = __webpack_require__(784);
/* import */ var _dependency_js__rspack_import_1_default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(_dependency_js__rspack_import_1);



it('The dependOn chunk must be loaded before the common chunk.', async () => {
  const fs = await eval(`import("fs")`);
  const path = await eval(`import("path")`);
  const source = fs.readFileSync(__rspack_import_meta_filename__, 'utf-8');
  const snapshotFile = /^export const __rspack_modules =/m.test(source)
    ? path.join(__SNAPSHOT__, 'runtimeModeSnapshot', 'foo.mjs.txt')
    : path.join(__SNAPSHOT__, 'foo.mjs.txt');

  const normalize = value => value.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').trimEnd();
  expect(normalize(source)).toBe(
    normalize(fs.readFileSync(snapshotFile, 'utf-8')),
  );
});


},
711(module) {
module.exports = {};


},

};
import { __webpack_require__ } from './runtime~nested-shared.mjs';
var __webpack_exec__ = function(moduleId) { return __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = moduleId); }
import * as __rspack_chunk_1 from './commons-dependency_js.mjs';
__webpack_require__.C(__rspack_chunk_1);
import * as __rspack_chunk_2 from './foo.mjs';
__webpack_require__.C(__rspack_chunk_2);
import * as __rspack_chunk_3 from './shared.mjs';
__webpack_require__.C(__rspack_chunk_3);
import * as __rspack_chunk_4 from './nested-shared.mjs';
__webpack_require__.C(__rspack_chunk_4);
var __webpack_exports__ = __webpack_exec__(353);
//# sourceMappingURL=foo.mjs.map
